notes: The response is technically thorough and well-structured but critically misses the BS11 30-business-day advance notification constraint as a hard blocker, under-flags the RBNZ notification status as an unknown assumption with project-stopping risk, conflates solution execution with problem framing in several sections, and includes new loan originations on the new platform as in-scope (which the corpus explicitly excludes from MVP), weakening both problem framing and MVP bounding.
